title: Animals Meat
description: This mod adds dog and cat meat
body:
This mod adds cat and dog meat. It run on Fabric and is created by WakiiZ.

Animals Meat will enrich your gameplay with new dog and cat meats added by this mod, which will be available at every point in your experience. This food will allow you to nourish yourself and avoid any misfortune in your survival.

If you have questions or ideas for my mod, you can go [on my reddit](https://www.reddit.com/user/Dry-Following-7380/comments/1kwr10h/animals_meat/?utm_source=share&utm_medium=web3x&utm_name=web3xcss&utm_term=1&utm_content=share_button)
